'''âb-z-r''' ('''bazarasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mythize|mythize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-z-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mythize|mythize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-z-r
|-
! Lemma
| bazarasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bazarithi|bazarithi]] || [[word:bazariji|bazariji]] || [[word:bazarishi|bazarishi]] || [[word:bazari|bazari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazaruthuth|bazaruthuth]] || [[word:bazarujuj|bazarujuj]] || [[word:bazarushush|bazarushush]] || [[word:bazar|bazar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazaruthu|bazaruthu]] || [[word:bazaruju|bazaruju]] || [[word:bazarushu|bazarushu]] || [[word:bazaru|bazaru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazarufuth|bazarufuth]] || [[word:bazarufuj|bazarufuj]] || [[word:bazarufush|bazarufush]] || [[word:bazaruf|bazaruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bazarethe|bazarethe]] || [[word:bazareje|bazareje]] || [[word:bazareshe|bazareshe]] || [[word:bazare|bazare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazarothoth|bazarothoth]] || [[word:bazarojoj|bazarojoj]] || [[word:bazaroshosh|bazaroshosh]] || [[word:bazar|bazar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazarotho|bazarotho]] || [[word:bazarojo|bazarojo]] || [[word:bazarosho|bazarosho]] || [[word:bazaro|bazaro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazarofoth|bazarofoth]] || [[word:bazarofoj|bazarofoj]] || [[word:bazarofosh|bazarofosh]] || [[word:bazarof|bazarof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bazarĂŠthĂŠ|bazarĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bazarĂŠjĂŠ|bazarĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bazarĂŠshĂŠ|bazarĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bazarĂŠ|bazarĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazarathath|bazarathath]] || [[word:bazarajaj|bazarajaj]] || [[word:bazarashash|bazarashash]] || [[word:bazar|bazar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazaratha|bazaratha]] || [[word:bazaraja|bazaraja]] || [[word:bazarasha|bazarasha]] || [[word:bazara|bazara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazarafath|bazarafath]] || [[word:bazarafaj|bazarafaj]] || [[word:bazarafash|bazarafash]] || [[word:bazaraf|bazaraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bazarasha|bazarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobazarasha|gobazarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibazarasha|gokibazarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bazarnĂŒsha|bazarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobazarnknĂŒsha|gobazarnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibazarnĂŒsha|gokibazarnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bazarshĂ«sha|bazarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobazarnkshĂ«sha|gobazarnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibazarshĂ«sha|gokibazarshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bazarosha|bazarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazarnkrosha|gobazarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibazarosha|gokibazarosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bazarmusha|bazarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazarnkmusha|gobazarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazarmusha|gokibazarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bazarsherasha|bazarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobazarnksherasha|gobazarnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibazarsherasha|gokibazarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bazarngasha|bazarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobazarnkngasha|gobazarnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibazarngasha|gokibazarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bazaryasha|bazaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobazarnkyasha|gobazarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibazaryasha|gokibazaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bazaryamasha|bazaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobazarnkyamasha|gobazarnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibazaryamasha|gokibazaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bazarnĂŒshĂ«sha|bazarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobazarnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gobazarnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibazarnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokibazarnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bazarnĂŒrosha|bazarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazarnknĂŒrosha|gobazarnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibazarnĂŒrosha|gokibazarnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazarnĂŒmusha|bazarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazarnknĂŒmusha|gobazarnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazarnĂŒmusha|gokibazarnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bazarshĂ«nĂŒsha|bazarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobazarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gobazarnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibazarshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokibazarshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bazarshĂ«rosha|bazarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazarnkshĂ«rosha|gobazarnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibazarshĂ«rosha|gokibazarshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazarshĂ«musha|bazarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazarnkshĂ«musha|gobazarnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazarshĂ«musha|gokibazarshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bazaronĂŒsha|bazaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobazarnkronĂŒsha|gobazarnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibazaronĂŒsha|gokibazaronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bazaroshĂ«sha|bazaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobazarnkroshĂ«sha|gobazarnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibazaroshĂ«sha|gokibazaroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazaromusha|bazaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazarnkromusha|gobazarnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazaromusha|gokibazaromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bazarmunĂŒsha|bazarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobazarnkmunĂŒsha|gobazarnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibazarmunĂŒsha|gokibazarmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bazarmushĂ«sha|bazarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobazarnkmushĂ«sha|gobazarnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibazarmushĂ«sha|gokibazarmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bazarmurosha|bazarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazarnkmurosha|gobazarnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibazarmurosha|gokibazarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bazar|bazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠzĂŠr|bĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobazar|hobazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠzĂŠr|hobĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobazar|hohobazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠzĂŠr|hohobĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbazar|nĂŒbazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠzĂŠr|nĂŒbĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbazar|nĂŒnĂŒbazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠzĂŠr|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbazar|nĂŻbazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠzĂŠr|nĂŻbĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbazar|nĂŻnĂŻbazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠzĂŠr|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubazar|lubazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠzĂŠr|lubĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubazar|lulubazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠzĂŠr|lulubĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libazar|libazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠzĂŠr|libĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibazar|lilibazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠzĂŠr|lilibĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobazar|kobazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠzĂŠr|kobĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobazar|kokobazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠzĂŠr|kokobĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebazar|kebazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠzĂŠr|kebĂŠzĂŠr]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebazar|kekebazar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠzĂŠr|kekebĂŠzĂŠr]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
